base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of bonus_car — a ui from 1991 street fighter ii. Bonus Stage — Car-smash minigame (famous 'you broke my car!' scene). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Bonus Stage — Car-smash minigame (famous 'you broke my car!' scene)
